auth_subtitle: Securely sign in to sync your Zakat data.
auth_cta_sign_in: Already have an account? Sign in
auth_error_password_min: Password must be at least 8 characters
dashboard_subtitle: See your Zakat position at a glance.
dashboard_coming_next_body: Wealth summary cards, nisab tracking, and reminder timeline will live here.
profile_settings_body: Identity, madhab preferences, and notification settings will be configurable here.
onboarding_subtitle: Set your Zakat preferences once, then track with clarity.
onboarding_card_desc: These defaults will shape your future assessments and reminders.
onboarding_saved_desc: {name} using {method} method, paid in {currency}, reminded on day {day}.
dashboard_wizard_subtitle: Step-by-step input for beginners. Values are saved automatically, so next time you only update what changed.
dashboard_wizard_step1_hint: Enter today’s value in your selected currency (same format everywhere, e.g. 1250.50).
dashboard_wizard_step2_hint: Liabilities should be amounts due now. Future instalments are normally excluded in the standard method.
dashboard_wizard_step2_due_now_guide: Due now = payable immediately or within your current billing cycle. Do not include long-term future debt here.
dashboard_wizard_step3_hint: Use a nisab value from a trusted local source. Presets below are quick starter defaults only.
dashboard_wizard_decimal_guide: Use numbers only. Decimals are allowed (example: 2500.75).
dashboard_wizard_field_cash_guide: Cash on hand and bank balances available today.
dashboard_wizard_field_gold_guide: Current market value of gold you own (not purchase price).
dashboard_wizard_field_silver_guide: Current market value of silver you own (not purchase price).
dashboard_wizard_field_investments_guide: Zakatable portion of stocks/funds/crypto intended as wealth.
dashboard_wizard_field_business_assets_g: Inventory, trade stock, and cash tied to your business.
dashboard_wizard_field_receivables_guide: Money others owe you that you reasonably expect to receive.
dashboard_wizard_field_debts_due_guide: Bills or debts that are due now (e.g., card statement due this cycle).
dashboard_wizard_field_nisab_guide: Threshold amount in your currency used to check zakat eligibility.
history_end_reached: You reached the end of history.
history_empty: No saved assessments yet. Tap “Save assessment” to keep this result.
zakat_result_subtitle: Live result in {currency}. Updates as you type.
zakat_due_desc_above: You are above nisab. Zakat due is 2.5% of your net zakatable wealth.
zakat_due_desc_below: Currently below nisab, so zakat due is 0.
error_session_not_ready: Session not ready. Please refresh and try again.
error_save_assessment_failed: Failed to save assessment on server
profile_confirm_signout_desc: You will need to sign in again to access your dashboard.
settings_zakat_defaults_desc: Set your preferred defaults for onboarding and future calculations.
reminders_coming_next_body: We’re preparing polished reminder controls here with notification timing, cadence, and regional prayer-aware defaults.
root_error_desc: Please refresh the page. If this continues, sign in again.
